notes: BG 6.36's engineering layer preserves the three-condition stack (vasyatma, yatata, upayatah) verbatim and untranslated. asamyatatma/vasyatma contrast is preserved. The Advaita commentator's narrow reading (upaya = abhyasa-vairagya from 6.35) and the Vishishtadvaita commentator's broader reading (upaya = karma-yoga) are preserved distinctly. dusprapa preserved. No tradition-conflation. PASS.
